text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have sharpened my concentration to a razor's
edge. My whole body is as an eye, an ear, and a
heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now, I can observe Umas without even looking. I
can see into their hearts without even speaking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the presence of Umas through the air...
That is the state I have achieved.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As my entire body breathes in Umamusume, I will
convert their essence into the greatest
performance ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she means by all that, but her
spirits seem to be soaring high before the race.
